scripts.build: source ~/emsdk/emsdk_env.sh && emcc game.c wasm_main.c -o battleship.js -s MODULARIZE=1 -s EXPORTED_FUNCTIONS="['_battleship_init','_battleship_reset','_battleship_get_cell','_battleship_get_game_state','_battleship_get_ships_sunk','_battleship_get_hit_count','_battleship_get_miss_count','_battleship_get_ship_count','_battleship_place_ship','_battleship_shoot']" -s EXPORTED_RUNTIME_METHODS="['ccall','cwrap','getValue']" -s ALLOW_MEMORY_GROWTH=1 -s INITIAL_MEMORY=16777216 -s TOTAL_STACK=2097152 -s WASM=1 -O2 -std=c99
